beats.what: A man sits on a bench while people walk on the platform.
A man walks along the platform towards the train.
People are walking on the platform near the train tracks.
A man walks past the camera on the station platform.
A train is stopped at the station platform with passengers nearby.

formal.text: A man sits on a bench amidst pedestrian traffic.
A man walks toward the stationary train.
Pedestrians traverse the platform near the tracks.
A man passes the camera on the platform.
A train remains stopped near several passengers.

sarcastic.text: Riveting. Another day of watching people exist.
A man marches toward destiny. Or a commute.
The sheer thrill of public transit continues.
Walking past the camera. Truly a cinematic masterpiece.
The train arrives. Groundbreaking stuff, really.

humorous_tech.text: System idle while waiting for a user request.
Initiating request to resolve the idle state.
High latency detected in the local network.
Packet loss is increasing as we approach the node.
Connection established. Finally, the payload has arrived.

humorous_non_tech.text: Just sitting here, waiting for something exciting to happen.
Ah, here comes a man on a mission.
Everyone is walking like they have somewhere important to be.
And another one zooms past. Someone's in a hurry!
Finally, the train arrives to save us all from boredom.
